prompt: Can you write the email to ask one of our volunteers to review someone's conference abstract? The conference deadline is March 15, and the doc is at https://docs.example.com/abstract123.
assertions: Warm, low-pressure tone that thanks the volunteer
Asks if they have time 'in the next week or so' (or similar near-term, soft ask)
Makes it easy to decline and offers to reassign
Frames it as the R-Ladies abstract review program
